description_long: This is a stylized, low-poly red biplane with a prominent double-wing structure and a single open cockpit. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers towards the tail, which features a distinctive, jagged-edged vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The front of the airplane is equipped with a two-blade propeller and a visible machine gun mounted above the nose, suggesting a vintage, possibly World War I-inspired design. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is open and centrally located, with a single seat and no visible canopy. The overall appearance is cartoonish, with exaggerated features and simplified geometry, making it suitable for urban-themed games or playful environments.
description: A stylized red biplane with double wings, an open cockpit, and a front-mounted propeller and machine gun. The tail has jagged stabilizers and the landing gear is fixed and exposed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double wings, open cockpit, front propeller, and machine gun mounted above the nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, fixed landing gear, and jagged tail stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin horizontal stabilizers, jagged vertical stabilizer, and the tail wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit, propeller, and machine gun.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, staggered wings; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, featuring jagged edges.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located forward on the fuselage, behind the propeller and machine gun.
